title: Watut Screen Blacklist
description: Adds screen blacklisting to the What Are They Up To mod
body:
This is a client-side utility mod that adds screen blacklisting to the WATUT mod.

Useful for blacklisting emote menus of mods such as Emotecraft, Custom Player Models, or Yes Steve Model.

Acquire screen names by activating "printScreenName" option in the config screen, which will print current screen name in the chat. Add full name or its package(ex. "com.modname") to the blacklist.
